description: Style Notefemella's latest line comes up with a shade for every colour crush - indulge your senses with this woven Femella top. With a lovely, flowy silhouette, there are various ways you can style this! Layer this under a blazer and pair it with tights, or tuck it into a high-waist pencil skirt and accessorize minimally.Product DetailsPurple sleeveless shawl neck top with the front hem longer than the backMaterial and CareBlended fabricCold wash, dry inside outDo not wring or bleach Size and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
